title: Sweet Rice Pudding with French Macarons
description: A creamy sweet rice pudding topped with crunchy French macarons for a delightful dessert.
instructions: Combine sweet rice, Chapssalgaru, and 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Cook on medium heat, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, whisk together Izzy, flour, and a pinch of salt.
Add the Izzy mixture to the cooked sweet rice and stir until combined.
Transfer the pudding mixture to individual ramekins and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the French macarons according to package instructions or make your own.
Once the pudding is set, top each ramekin with a French macaron and a sprinkle of Risotto for added texture.
